title: Add hourly tick marks to timeline

log.context: Add hourly tick marks to timeline

Done. Here is what was added to `/mnt/data/hello-world/timeline.html`:

**CSS (lines 348-393):** New `.hour-tick`, `.hour-tick-line`, and `.hour-tick-label` styles. Tick lines are 1px with `opacity: 0.15` using `var(--text-muted)`. Labels are 0.5rem at `opacity: 0.25`. Desktop ticks are 18px vertical lines centered on the timeline; mobile ticks are 18px horizontal lines centered on the vertical timeline rail.
